debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn✝ : 2 ≤ n
points : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) × EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hpoints : ∀ (i : Fin n), (points i).1 ≠ (points i).2
interAlong : Fin n → Fin (n - 1) ↪o ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)
interBtw : (i : Fin n) → { j // i ≠ j } ≃ Fin (n - 1)
lineMap_eq_iff :
  ∀ (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (ri rj : ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)),
    (lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2) ↑ri = (lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2) ↑rj ↔
      ri = (interAlong i) ((interBtw i) ⟨j, hij⟩) ∧ rj = (interAlong j) ((interBtw j) ⟨i, ⋯⟩)
clap : Bool → Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)
clap_def : ∀ (b : Bool), clap b = if b = true then Fin.rev else _root_.id
hn : Odd n
⊢ ∃ F,
    ∀ (f g : Fin n),
      f ≠ g →
        (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧
          ∀ (t : Fin (n - 1)),
            (lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F f).1) (clap (F f).2 t)) ≠
              (lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F g).1) (clap (F g).2 t))

    simp only [clap_def, Fin.rev_apply, Fin.val_rev, Fin.val_add, Fin.val_sub, Fin.val_zero]
    have hn' : Odd n := hn
    have h_even_odd : (f.val % 2 = 0) ≠ (g.val % 2 = 0) ∨ (f.val % 2 = 0) = (g.val % 2 = 0) := by
      by_cases h : f.val % 2 = 0 <;> by_cases h' : g.val % 2 = 0 <;> simp_all
    cases' h_even_odd with h_diff h_same
    · have : (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) ≠ (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) := by
        simp_all
      contrapose! this
      apply lineMap_eq_iff
      simp_all
    · have : (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) = (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) := by
        simp_all
      have : (interAlong f (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t)) =
             (interAlong g (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t)) → False := by
        intro h_inter
        have h_inter_f : interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ = if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t := by
          apply interBtw.injective
          simp_all
        have h_inter_g : interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ = if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t := by
          apply interBtw.injective
          simp_all
        have h_sum : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val = n - 2 := by
          have : (interBtw f).toFun.bijective := (interBtw f).bijective
          have : (interBtw g).toFun.bijective := (interBtw g).bijective
          have : Fintype.card {j // f ≠ j} = n - 1 := by
            simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, Fintype.card_fin]
          have : Fintype.card {j // g ≠ j} = n - 1 := by
            simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, Fintype.card_fin]
          have : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val = n - 2 := by
            have : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val = (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val := by
              apply Eq.symm
              apply Eq.symm
              have : (interBtw f).symm (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩) = ⟨g, hfg⟩ := by
                simp
              have : (interBtw g).symm (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩) = ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := by
                simp
              sorry
            sorry
          exact this
        have h_parity : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val % 2 ≠ (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val % 2 := by
          rw [← h_sum]
          have : (n - 2) % 2 = 1 := by
            have : n % 2 = 1 := hn'.out
            omega
          omega
        have h_t_parity : t.val % 2 = (Fin.rev t).val % 2 := by
          have : (Fin.rev t).val = n - 2 - t.val := by
            simp [Fin.rev]
          rw [this]
          have : (n - 2 - t.val) % 2 = (n - 2) % 2 - t.val % 2 := by
            omega
          rw [this]
          have : (n - 2) % 2 = 1 := by
            have : n % 2 = 1 := hn'.out
            omega
          omega
        have h_contra : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val % 2 = (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val % 2 := by
          cases' h_same with h_same h_same <;> simp_all
        contradiction
      apply this

use fun i => ⟨i, i.val % 2 = 0⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · intro h
    apply hfg
    rw [h]
  · intro t
    have h_odd : Odd n := hn
    simp only [clap_def, Fin.rev] at *
    have key : (f.val + t.val) % n ≠ (g.val + t.val) % n := by
      intro h
      have : f.val % n = g.val % n := by omega
      have : f = g := by
        apply Fin.eq_of_veq
        exact Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Fin.is_lt f) ▸ Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Fin.is_lt g) ▸ this
      contradiction
    have h_inter : interAlong f (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) ≠ interAlong g (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) := by
      apply interAlong.injective
      have hf : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val = (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t).val := by
        sorry
      have hg : (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val = (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t).val := by
        sorry
      sorry
    exact lineMap_eq_iff _ _ hfg _ _ |>.mpr ⟨h_inter, by sorry⟩ |>.elim

        apply Fin.is_lt
      have h₉ : (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val < n - 1 := by
        apply Fin.is_lt

        simp_all
      omega
    have h₂ : (f.val % 2 = 0) = (g.val % 2 = 0) → False := by
      intro h
      have h₃ : (f.val + g.val) % 2 = 0 := by
        omega
      have h₄ : n % 2 = 1 := by
        exact hn.neg_one_pow
      have h₅ : (n - 1) % 2 = 0 := by
        omega
      have h₆ : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val = n - 2 := by
        exact h₁
      have h₇ : ((interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + t.val) % (n - 1) ≠ ((interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val + (n - 2 - t.val)) % (n - 1) := by
        intro h
        have h₈ : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + t.val ≡ (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val + (n - 2 - t.val) [MOD (n - 1)] := by
          simpa [Nat.ModEq] using h
        have h₉ : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val ≡ n - 2 [MOD (n - 1)] := by

          apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt
          apply Fin.is_lt
        have h₁₃ : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val = (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val := by
          simpa [h₁₂] using h
        exact h₁₀ h₁₃
      exact h₇
    have h₃ : (f.val % 2 = 0) ≠ (g.val % 2 = 0) := by
      apply h₂
    cases' (f.val % 2 = 0) with hf hf <;> cases' (g.val % 2 = 0) with hg hg <;> simp_all

use fun i => (i, true)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t
    simp only [clap_def, Bool.true]

    have h₃ := interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩

    simp at h₄

    have h₆ : t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := h₄.2
    have h₇ : interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := Eq.trans h₅ h₆.symm
    have h₈ : (interBtw f).symm (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩) = (interBtw g).symm (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩) := by
      rw [h₇]
    simp at h₈
    have h₉ : ⟨g, hfg⟩ = ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := by
      apply (interBtw f).injective
      rw [← (interBtw f).apply_symm_apply, ← (interBtw g).apply_symm_apply, h₇]
    simp at h₉
    exact hfg h₉.1

      intro i j hij

      have h_bij' : Function.Bijective (interBtw j) := (interBtw j).bijective
      intro h_eq

        lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2 (interAlong j (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩)).1 :=
        by rw [← lineMap_eq_iff _ _ hij _ _, h_eq]

        have h_same := lineMap_eq_iff _ _ hij _ _
        simp_all
      contradiction
    have h_parity : (f.val % 2 = 0) ≠ (g.val % 2 = 0) ∨ (f.val % 2 = 0) = (g.val % 2 = 0) := by
      tauto

    <;> intro h_eq

    <;> simp_all
    <;> have h_fin : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) = (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      simp_all
    <;> have h_contra : False := h_inter _ _ hfg h_fin
    <;> contradiction

use fun i => ⟨i, true⟩
  intro f g hfg t
  simp_all [clap_def]
  have h1 : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) ≠ (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) := by
    have h_odd : Odd n := hn
    have h_ne : n - 1 ≠ 0 := by omega
    have h_inj : Function.Injective (interBtw f) := (interBtw f).injective
    have h_inj' : Function.Injective (interBtw g) := (interBtw g).injective
    intro h_eq
    have h_contra : f = g := by
      apply Fin.eq_of_veq
      have h_val : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val = (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val := by
        simp_all
      have h_val' : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).val + (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).val = n - 2 := by
        have h_total : ∀ i : Fin n, ∑ j in {k | k ≠ i}, 1 = n - 1 := by
          intro i
          simp [Finset.card_erase]
        have h_symm : ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).val + (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).val = n - 2 := by
          intro i j hij
          have h_perm : (interBtw i) ∘ Equiv.ofBijective (fun k : {l // l ≠ i} => ⟨(k : Fin n), by aesop⟩) (by aesop) =
            Equiv.refl (Fin (n - 1)) := by
            ext k
            simp
          sorry
        exact h_symm f g hfg
      omega
    contradiction
  exact (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg _ _).mp (by aesop) |>.symm ▸ h1 ▸ by aesop

  have h1 : interAlong f t ≠ interAlong g t := by
    intro h
    have h2 := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f t) (interAlong g t)
    simp_all
  exact h1

use fun i => ⟨i, true⟩
  intro f g hfg t
  simp [clap_def]
  have h1 := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f t) (interAlong g t)
  simp at h1
  aesop

use fun i => ⟨i, (i : ℕ) % 2 = 0⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · intro h
    apply hfg
    rw [← Fin.ext_iff] at h
    exact h
  · intro t
    have h₁ : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) ≠ (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) := by
      intro h
      have h₂ := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩)) (interAlong g (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩))
      simp_all
    have h₂ : (clap ((f : ℕ) % 2 = 0) t : Fin (n - 1)) = (clap ((g : ℕ) % 2 = 0) t : Fin (n - 1)) → False := by
      cases' Nat.even_or_odd (f : ℕ) with hf hf <;> cases' Nat.even_or_odd (g : ℕ) with hg hg <;>
        simp_all [clap_def, Fin.rev_involutive, Fin.rev_eq_iff]
      all_goals
        omega
    have h₃ := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f (clap ((f : ℕ) % 2 = 0) t)) (interAlong g (clap ((g : ℕ) % 2 = 0) t))
    simp_all

use fun i => ⟨i, true⟩
  intro f g hfg t
  simp only [clap_def, if_true]
  have h1 := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f t) (interAlong g t)
  simp at h1
  aesop

use fun i => ⟨i, true⟩
  intro f g hfg t
  simp_all [clap_def]
  have h1 := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f t) (interAlong g t)
  simp_all
  <;> aesop

use fun i => ⟨i, i.val % 2 = 0⟩
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · intro h
    apply hfg
    rw [h]
  · intro t
    have h₁ : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := rfl
    have h₂ : (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := rfl
    simp only [clap_def, Fin.rev] at *
    have h₃ : (f.val % 2 = 0) ≠ (g.val % 2 = 0) ∨ (f.val % 2 = 0) = (g.val % 2 = 0) := by
      by_cases h : f.val % 2 = 0 <;> by_cases h' : g.val % 2 = 0 <;> simp_all
    cases' h₃ with h₃ h₃ <;> simp_all [Fin.rev_apply]
    all_goals
      have h₄ : (interAlong f (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t)) =
        interAlong f (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) := rfl
      have h₅ : (interAlong g (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t)) =
        interAlong g (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) := rfl
      rw [← lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg _ _]
      intro h₆
      have h₇ : (if f.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := by
        simpa [h₆] using h₆.1
      have h₈ : (if g.val % 2 = 0 then t else Fin.rev t) = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := by
        simpa [h₆] using h₆.2
      have h₉ : interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ = Fin.rev (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩) := by
        have h₁₀ : n - 1 = (n - 1) := rfl
        have h₁₁ : Odd n := hn
        have h₁₂ : Even (n - 1) := by
          cases' h₁₁ with k hk
          rw [hk]
          exact ⟨k, by ring⟩
        have h₁₃ : Fin.rev (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩) = (n - 2) - (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ : ℕ) := by
          simp [Fin.rev]
        have h₁₄ : interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ + interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ = n - 2 := by
          apply Eq.symm
          apply Eq.symm
          have h₁₅ : ∀ i : Fin n, Function.Bijective (interBtw i) := fun i => (interBtw i).bijective
          have h₁₆ : ∀ i j : Fin n, i ≠ j → (interBtw i ⟨j, hfg⟩ : ℕ) + (interBtw j ⟨i, hfg.symm⟩ : ℕ) = n - 2 := by
            intro i j hij
            have h₁₇ : (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ : ℕ) ≠ (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ : ℕ) → False := by
              intro h
              contradiction
            have h₁₈ : (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ : ℕ) < n - 1 := by
              apply Fin.is_lt
            have h₁₉ : (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩ : ℕ) < n - 1 := by
              apply Fin.is_lt
            have h₂₀ : (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ : ℕ) + (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩ : ℕ) = n - 2 := by
              sorry
            exact h₂₀
          exact h₁₆ f g hfg
        rw [h₁₄, h₁₃]
        omega
      rw [h₉] at h₇
      cases' h₃ with h₃ h₃ <;> simp_all
      all_goals
        have h₁₀ : t = Fin.rev t → False := by
          intro h
          have h₁₁ : t + t = n - 2 := by
            rw [h, Fin.rev_apply]
            ring
          have h₁₂ : Even (n - 1) := by
            cases' hn with k hk
            rw [hk]
            exact ⟨k, by ring⟩
          have h₁₃ : Odd (n - 1) := by
            cases' hn with k hk
            rw [hk]
            exact ⟨k, by ring⟩
          contradiction
        contradiction

use fun i => (i, true)
  intro f g hfg t
  simp only [clap_def, Fin.rev]
  have h1 : (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) ≠ (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ : Fin (n - 1)) := by
    apply Fin.ne_of_lt
    have := interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩
    have := interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩
    -- Since n is odd, n-1 is even, so the ordering of intersections ensures no collision
    -- More precisely, the key is that for odd n, the permutation induced by reversing
    -- has no fixed points and the trajectories are disjoint.
    -- We use the fact that the map t ↦ (t, rev t) never hits the same intersection
    -- for distinct segments due to parity.
    sorry
  have h2 := lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f (clap true t)) (interAlong g (clap true t))
  simp_all
